generated_comment: Arre bhai, office mein bhi jab koi lady staff itna chhoti baat pe blast kare na, pehla thought wahi aata hai ki maybe mood swing chal raha hai. Important discussion uss time avoid karo bas, baad mein normal ho jaati hain... don't take it seriously, just saying.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it dismisses women's anger as a hormonal or emotional fluctuation rather than a valid reaction. It encodes the frame through references to 'mood swing' and the idea that women become irrational during certain times and should not be taken seriously.
original_frame: Prenup, Alimony as Reverse Dowry, Women
persona_text: You are Suresh. Age 45. Married for 18 years. A businessman in Ahmedabad. You are sitting with three male friends at your farmhouse on a Saturday evening having drinks after one of your friends just got served divorce papers by his wife. Your friend is telling the group what his wife is demanding in the settlement. You are responding and sharing your views on what women want from marriage and what this particular woman's real intentions were from the beginning.
